# PERF-82 positive: rows.StructScan inside a for rows.Next() loop
lang: go
file: PERF-082-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import "github.com/jmoiron/sqlx"

type User struct {
	ID    int64  `db:"id"`
	Email string `db:"email"`
}

func ListUsers(db *sqlx.DB) ([]User, error) {
	rows, err := db.Queryx("SELECT id, email FROM users")
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	defer rows.Close()
	var out []User
	for rows.Next() {
		var u User
		if err := rows.StructScan(&u); err != nil {
			return nil, err
		}
		out = append(out, u)
	}
	return out, nil
}
